Video.summary: At the Sprint Center on January 18, 2020, Monster Jam's 2020 season heats up with triple threat action!
Video.title: Sprint Center - Kansas City, MO

Video.summary: The drivers go muddin' at MetLife stadium, in this edition of Monster Jam.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: We bring you the legends of Monster Jam, once again from Lebanon, NY, at the Lebanon Valley Speedway.

Video.summary: All the racing action from the Florida Citrus Bowl on January 24, 2009.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Former Triple Threat Series Champion Colton Eichelberger returns to Monster Jam looking to lead Max D to another freestyle win, but his old rival Tyler Menninga leads the series and attempts to pilot Grave Digger to another event win. Former Rookie of the Year, Nick Pagliarulo returns to Kraken for his series premiere as Stadium Championship Series East heads to Tampa.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Brodozer, the first diesel-powered machine to hit the competition, makes its debut in Nashville!
Video.title: Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: Monster Jam trucks take to the track during the January 4-5, 2019 appearance at Vivint Smart Home Arena in Salt Lake City, Utah. Featuring Tyler Menninga in Grave Digger, Elvis Lainez in El Toro Loco, Tanner Root in Monster Mutt, Colton Eichelberger in Max-D, Tony Ochs in Soldier Fortune Black Ops, Myranda Cozad in Scooby-Doo, Austin Minton in Megalodon and Bari Musawwir in Zombie.
Video.title: Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Watch all your favorite Monster Jam trucks and drivers race at Angel Stadium on February 12, 2015.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season continues with exciting freestyle action from the final event at the HHH Metrodome on December 7, 2013.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: 20 of Monster Jam's top superstars are ready to battle it out on a new course tonight!
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing
MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ - Racing

Video.summary: All the freestyle action from Chase Field, on January 29, 2011.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Freestyle

Video.summary: Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson continues to lead the east series as the action heats up at the PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh. Monster Jam’s reigning Rookie of the Year will be challenged through four competitions by Bernard Lyght in Megalodon and Linsey Read piloting Scooby-Doo as they battle for the Overall Event Championship.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: The Monster Jam Speedsters hit the track for the first Obstacle Course Challenge of the weekend during Monster Jam World Finals XX (20), direct from Camping World Stadium in Orlando, Florida.
Video.title: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Speedsters

Image.alt: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Speedsters
World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Speedsters

Video.summary: Enjoy this throwback compilation of the best of the Superman monster truck!
Video.title: Superman Throwback Highlights Compilation

Video.summary: Racing, skills, and freestyle action are in store during Monster Jam's visit to Detroit, MI for Round 15.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI

Video.summary: Monster Jam Primetime continues with more fun and excitement in Tampa!
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Primetime visits San Antonio, TX for Round 7 of Stadium Championship East.
Video.title: Alamodome - San Antonio, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh, PA for round 9 of Arena in 30.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: Monster Jam Replay arrives at the InTrustBank Arena in Wichita, Kansas, for a pivotal Round 8 of the Arena Championship Series West. The stakes are higher than ever as the top two drivers in the series—Blake Granger and Armando Castro—face off in a high-pressure JCB Racing matchup that could shift the season leaderboard. Fans are treated to the technical brilliance of the Two Wheel Skills Challenge, featuring daring combos and gravity-defying maneuvers from the likes of Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Tim Hall Jr. in Jurassic Attack. The evening reaches a fever pitch during the Freestyle segment, where "Daredevil Diva" Angelina Nock takes Megalodon to the skies and Cliff Turner hunts for a breakthrough performance in Velociraptor. Witness the passion and raw power as these elite athletes push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute edge for the Wichita crowd.
Video.title: InTrustBank Arena - Wichita, KS

Video.summary: Witness the excitement during Monster Jam's 2013 season in Chase Field, located in Phoenix, AZ!
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ

Video.summary: The fun continues during Monster Jam's 2014 season stop at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, TX.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX
